Describe the progression of the pumpkin carving activity from start to finish.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a large orange pumpkin rests on a beige tiled countertop; at 8s, a red-handled saw is inserted vertically into the top of the pumpkin; at 12s, the top of the pumpkin is sliced off exposing the stringy yellow interior; at 16s, the cut top lies on the counter near an orange bowl.

question: Describe the appearance and placement of tools and objects on the counter over time.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a large orange pumpkin occupies the central foreground without tools; at 8s, a red-handled carving tool and bright orange plastic bowl appear; at 12s, red handled tools lie on the tiles to the left of the pumpkin; at 18s, a red-handled saw is stuck into the side of the pumpkin.
